short_description: Land your dream job 10x faster with AI-powered CV matching and auto-apply.
full_description:
Careerly is the smartest way to find and land your next job. Upload your CV once, and our AI does the rest — matching you to perfect opportunities, tailoring your application, and applying automatically.

Key Features:

📊 Smart Job Matching
Our AI analyses your CV and matches you to jobs that truly fit your skills and experience. Not just keywords — real understanding of your strengths.

🚀 Auto Apply
One tap to apply with a tailored CV and cover letter. Or set it to fully automatic and let Careerly work whilst you sleep.

🎯 Swipe to Discover
Browse jobs like never before. Swipe right to save, left to skip. Simple and fast.

🧠 AI Career Coach
Chat with an AI that knows your CV inside out. Get personalised interview prep, salary advice, and career strategy.

📊 Application Tracker
Track every application in one dashboard. See response rates, interview rates, and analytics at a glance.

🎓 Interview Prep
AI-generated practice questions tailored to each role. Mock interviews with instant feedback.

Why Careerly?
• Save hours of manual job searching
• Every application is tailored, never generic
• Beat ATS systems with AI-optimised CVs
• Track everything in one place
• GDPR compliant — your data is safe

Serving job seekers across the United Kingdom and European Union.

Start free with 5 auto-applies per month. Upgrade to Pro (£15/month) or Premium (£29/month) for unlimited access.

Careerly Ltd. Registered in England & Wales.
keywords: job search, CV, resume, auto apply, AI jobs, career, UK jobs, EU jobs, job matching, cover letter, interview prep
